_comment: Retrieval gold set for scripts/wiki-eval.py. Each query object: 'query' (a representative pentest search), 'expected' (wiki-relative canonical page path(s) that MUST rank in top-k; ANY match counts, so twins may both be listed), optional 'mode' ('semantic' default, or 'keyword' for exact alias/CVE strings). Add a query = append one object, then run `python3 scripts/wiki-eval.py --verify-gold`. Keep this generic: no client host/IP/cred.
